title: XboxGamepadMapping
description: Mapping for Microsoft Xbox controllers (Xbox One, Xbox Series X/S, and compatible third-party XInput devices) connected via USB or Bluetooth. Inherits the full GenericDualAnalogGamepadMapping layout, which mirrors the W3C standard gamepad layout that XInput controllers follow natively. The Share button (Xbox Series) maps to the Share channel.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Mapping for Microsoft Xbox controllers (Xbox One, Xbox Series X/S, and compatible third-party XInput devices) connected via USB or Bluetooth.

Inherits the full GenericDualAnalogGamepadMapping layout, which mirrors the W3C standard gamepad layout that XInput controllers follow natively. The Share button (Xbox Series) maps to the Share channel.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Releases all button and axis control references held by this mapping. Call when the associated gamepad disconnects to allow garbage collection.

members.name: hasChannel
members.description: Returns true when this mapping declares at least one button or axis control that writes to channel. Use to detect device-specific capabilities at runtime — e.g. before binding an input to a right-stick channel that may not exist on a single Joy-Con.

members.name: axes
members.description: Ordered list of axes, indexed by the Gamepad API axis index.

members.name: buttons
members.description: Ordered list of buttons, indexed by the Gamepad API button index.

members.name: family
members.description: Identifies the device family this mapping targets.
